error_signature: data not fetched on page load
title: Data not fetched on page load due to binding issue
symptom: When entering a page, the data from the collection is not fetched, resulting in 'NaN' displayed in dynamic fields.
applies_when: Fetch this collection automatically is enabled
not_this_if: Data is fetched correctly when editing the collection definition
root_cause: The collection may depend on a binding that is not available at the time of page load. This can occur if the required parameters are not set or accessible when the page is first rendered.
fix_steps: Ensure the binding for the path parameter is correctly set
Set up a workflow to fetch the collection on page load
agent_instruction: Check the binding settings and implement a workflow to fetch the collection on page load.
